allow: Bash(do sed -i 's/@definatype\\//@supatype\\//g; s/definatype-schema-engine/supatype-schema-engine/g; s/definatype-engine/supatype-engine/g; s/definatype\\.config\\.ts/supatype.config.ts/g; s/definatype\\.admin\\.ts/supatype.admin.ts/g; s/npx definatype /npx supatype /g; s/ definatype dev / supatype dev /g; s/ definatype push/ supatype push/g; s/ definatype deploy/ supatype deploy/g; s/ definatype link/ supatype link/g; s/_definatype_migrations/_supatype_migrations/g; s/definatype_auth/supatype_auth/g; s/DefinatypeProvider/SupatypeProvider/g; s/Definatype/Supatype/g; s/definatype /supatype /g' "$f")
